---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new research-support capability
title: "Feature: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What research workflow or evidence retrieval problem would this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or tool behavior.

## Data Sources

List relevant APIs or sources, such as PubMed, ClinicalTrials.gov, Crossref, or OpenAlex.

## Safety and Scope Notes

Explain how the feature should avoid diagnosis, treatment recommendations, or medical advice.

## Example Output

Show the shape of the desired structured output, if known.
